releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Improve maintainability of the code and dependencies.

## What's Changed
* Add workflow by @juan-miii in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/7
* build(deps-dev): bump tslib from 2.4.0 to 2.8.1 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/6
* build(deps-dev): bump typescript from 4.7.4 to 5.7.3 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/8
* build(deps): bump the npm_and_yarn group with 2 updates by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/9
* build(deps-dev): bump @types/node from 16.18.83 to 22.13.5 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/5
* build(deps-dev): bump obsidian from 1.5.7-1 to 1.8.7 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/2
* build(deps-dev): bump @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin from 5.29.0 to 8.25.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/4
* build(deps-dev): bump @typescript-eslint/parser from 5.29.0 to 8.25.0 by @dependabot in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @juan-miii made their first contribution in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/7
* @dependabot made their first contribution in https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/pull/6

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/juan-miii/obsidian-notice-plugin/compare/1.0.2...1.0.3
